parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  status: $json.status,
  status_detail: $json.status_detail,
  provider_customer_id: $json.provider_customer_id,
  invoice_url: $json.invoice_url,
  bank_slip_url: $json.bank_slip_url,
  payment_link: $json.payment_link,
  external_reference: $json.external_reference,
  due_date: $json.due_date,
  billingType: $json.billingType,
  webhook_payload: $json.webhook_payload,
} }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { received: true, provider_payment_id: $('Normalizar Evento').first().json.provider_payment_id, status: $('Normalizar Evento').first().json.status } }];
